metadata.description: Critical implementation tasks identified by comprehensive audit for true Liftrix UI/UX Redesign PRD compliance - addressing security risks, functionality gaps, integration issues, legacy system retirement, and production readiness
metadata.prerequisite: These tasks address ALL critical gaps preventing production deployment and ensure sustainable long-term success

tasks.title: User ID Authentication Security Audit and Fix
tasks.description: Comprehensive audit and fix of all user ID references to eliminate hardcoded 'current_user' patterns and prevent cross-user data leakage in widget systems and data access layers

implementation_details.approach: Systematic codebase scan for hardcoded user references, implement proper Firebase user ID validation, add runtime checks for user context consistency
functions_to_implement: UserIdValidator for consistent user context validation
SecurityTest suite for cross-user data isolation verification
Runtime user context verification in all data access points
Firebase user ID consistency checks across ViewModels
tests_to_write: Cross-user data isolation test preventing data leakage
User context validation test across all major workflows
Firebase authentication integration test
Widget user scoping security test

acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded 'current_user' references in entire codebase
All data operations use validated Firebase user IDs
Cross-user data isolation verified through automated testing
Widget system properly scoped to authenticated user context
Runtime user context validation prevents unauthorized access
validation_steps: Automated codebase scan for hardcoded user references
Cross-user data access attempt testing
Widget preference isolation verification
Analytics event user context validation
potential_risks: Data migration needed to fix existing records with invalid user references
Widget preferences may be reset during user context fix
Performance impact from additional user validation checks

tasks.title: Complete Session Editing Screen Implementation
tasks.description: Implement missing EditSessionScreen.kt and complete integration for historical workout session data editing, including proper navigation, state management, and data persistence

implementation_details.approach: Complete session editing implementation using UnifiedWorkoutCard components, proper ViewModel state management, comprehensive validation, and error handling
functions_to_implement: EditSessionScreen with unified component integration
EditSessionViewModel following BaseViewModel<S,E> pattern
UpdateWorkoutSessionUseCase with data validation
Session data modification with timestamp updates
Navigation integration with proper error boundaries
tests_to_write: EditSessionScreen UI component tests
EditSessionViewModel state management tests
Session data modification integration tests
Historical session editing end-to-end workflow tests

acceptance_criteria: EditSessionScreen accessible from workout history with proper navigation
All session data fields editable: exercises, sets, reps, weights, duration
Visual indicators clearly show historical editing mode vs creation
Data modifications update original records with new timestamps
Comprehensive validation prevents invalid session data
Error handling provides user-friendly feedback for failures
validation_steps: End-to-end session editing workflow testing
Data persistence verification after session modifications
Visual distinction validation between editing modes
Error scenario testing with invalid data inputs
potential_risks: Complex session state management leading to data corruption
Navigation integration issues with existing workout flows
Performance impact from heavy session data editing operations

tasks.title: Complete Terminology Migration in WorkoutScreen
tasks.description: Fix remaining 12+ 'template' references in WorkoutScreen.kt and related files to complete the transition to 'Creating a workout' terminology as required by FR-002

implementation_details.approach: Systematic replacement of all 'template' terminology with workflow-based language, update navigation parameters, ensure consistency with string resources
functions_to_implement: Updated WorkoutScreen composable with consistent 'Creating a workout' terminology
WorkoutViewModel state management reflecting new terminology
Navigation parameter updates to remove template references
String resource consolidation for consistent terminology
tests_to_write: Terminology consistency validation test
UI text verification test for 'Creating a workout' language
Navigation parameter validation test
String resource usage verification test

acceptance_criteria: Zero 'template' references in WorkoutScreen.kt and related UI files
'Creating a workout' terminology used consistently across all workflow screens
Navigation parameters updated to reflect new terminology
String resources consolidated and terminology-consistent
Auto-save prompts use new language without 'template' word
validation_steps: Automated scan for 'template' references in UI code
Manual UI testing to verify terminology consistency
Navigation flow testing with new parameter names
String resource usage validation
potential_risks: Breaking changes to existing navigation flows
Inconsistency between UI text and backend API terminology
User confusion during transition period

tasks.title: Complete Component Integration Across All Screens
tasks.description: Apply UnifiedWorkoutCard and ModernActionButton components to the remaining 70% of screens to achieve true visual consistency as required by FR-001

implementation_details.approach: Systematic replacement of legacy Card and Button components with unified component system, maintain existing functionality while improving visual consistency
functions_to_implement: ProgressScreen conversion to UnifiedWorkoutCard for analytics displays
SettingsScreen integration with ModernActionButton hierarchy
OnboardingScreen modernization with unified component patterns
ProfileScreen card layout standardization
ActiveWorkoutScreen enhanced with consistent component usage
tests_to_write: ComponentIntegrationTest validating unified component usage across all screens
Visual consistency regression test
Button hierarchy compliance test
Card layout standardization verification test

acceptance_criteria: 100% of screens use UnifiedWorkoutCard for card-based layouts
All interactive buttons follow ModernActionButton hierarchy (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary)
Visual consistency achieved across all app screens
Legacy Card and Button components completely replaced
Component usage follows established design system guidelines
validation_steps: Automated test scanning for legacy component usage
Visual consistency validation across all screens
Button hierarchy compliance verification
User workflow testing for visual consistency
potential_risks: Breaking changes to existing screen layouts
Component integration conflicts with existing functionality
Performance impact from widespread component changes

tasks.title: Implement Performance Validation and 60fps Verification System
tasks.description: Create comprehensive performance measurement system to validate 60fps targets, measure task completion improvements, and verify cognitive load reduction as required by PRD success metrics

implementation_details.approach: Implement automated 60fps validation using Choreographer API, create task completion time measurement system, develop cognitive load assessment based on interaction patterns
functions_to_implement: PerformanceValidator for real-time 60fps monitoring during interactions
MetricsCollector for task completion time and success rate measurement
SixtyFpsValidationTest for automated performance regression detection
Cognitive load assessment based on user interaction patterns and error rates
tests_to_write: 60fps validation test for all card press animations and screen transitions
Task completion metrics test measuring workflow efficiency improvements
Performance regression test suite for CI/CD integration
Memory usage validation test during extended UI interactions

acceptance_criteria: 60fps maintained during all card interactions and screen transitions
Automated performance testing integrated into CI/CD pipeline
Task completion rate improvement measurement system operational
Cognitive load reduction metrics based on interaction patterns
Performance regression detection prevents deployment of slow code
validation_steps: 60fps validation across different device specifications
Task completion time measurement before/after redesign comparison
Performance regression testing in CI/CD pipeline
Memory and battery usage impact assessment
potential_risks: Performance monitoring overhead impacting actual app performance
Test flakiness affecting CI/CD reliability
Device-specific performance variations complicating validation

tasks.title: Implement Grey Usage Measurement and Reduction System
tasks.description: Create automated grey usage detection and measurement system to validate FR-001 AC3 requirement of reducing grey usage to less than 20% of interface elements

implementation_details.approach: Automated color analysis system scanning all UI components for grey usage, implement enforcement mechanisms, create reporting dashboard for design compliance
functions_to_implement: GreyUsageAnalyzer for automated detection of grey colors in UI components
Color usage measurement across all screens and components
Compliance reporting system for design team validation
Enforcement mechanisms preventing new grey color introductions
tests_to_write: GreyUsageValidationTest ensuring <20% grey usage target compliance
ColorUsageAuditTest for comprehensive color palette validation
Design system compliance test for semantic color usage
Grey usage regression test preventing future violations

acceptance_criteria: Automated grey usage measurement system operational
Grey usage verified to be <20% of total interface elements
Compliance reporting provides clear grey usage metrics
CI/CD pipeline prevents introduction of excessive grey usage
Alternative semantic colors used instead of grey where possible
validation_steps: Comprehensive UI component grey usage audit
Visual validation of reduced grey usage across all screens
Automated testing preventing grey usage regression
Design team validation of color palette compliance
potential_risks: Automated grey detection may have false positives
Existing UI components may require significant color updates
Design changes may impact user familiarity with interface

tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive End-to-End Workflow Testing
tasks.description: Create comprehensive testing suite covering complete user workflows from workout creation through active sessions to historical editing, ensuring data integrity and user experience consistency

implementation_details.approach: End-to-end testing covering complete user journeys, state management validation, data persistence verification, navigation flow testing, error scenario handling
functions_to_implement: CompleteWorkflowTest covering full create→start→complete→edit cycle
WorkoutCreationFlowTest validating terminology and component integration
ActiveSessionFlowTest ensuring session state management integrity
HistoricalEditingFlowTest verifying both workout and session editing functionality
tests_to_write: End-to-end workflow test covering complete user journey
State persistence test across app restarts and configuration changes
Data integrity test ensuring no data loss during workflow transitions
Error recovery test validating graceful handling of failure scenarios

acceptance_criteria: Complete workout creation→session start→completion→editing workflow functions without errors
State transitions maintain data integrity across all workflow steps
Navigation flows work correctly between all workflow screens
Session state persists correctly across app lifecycle events
Both workout routine and session editing verified through comprehensive testing
validation_steps: Manual testing of complete user workflows on multiple devices
Automated end-to-end testing covering all workflow scenarios
State persistence testing across app restarts and configuration changes
Error injection testing to validate graceful failure handling
potential_risks: Complex state management leading to workflow failures or data corruption
Navigation issues causing users to become trapped in incomplete workflows
Session state persistence failures leading to data loss

tasks.title: Complete Accessibility Compliance Validation and WCAG 2.1 AA Verification
tasks.description: Comprehensive accessibility testing and validation to ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all redesigned components and screens, including screen reader support and keyboard navigation

implementation_details.approach: Comprehensive accessibility testing using automated tools and manual validation, ensure proper screen reader announcements, validate keyboard navigation, verify color contrast compliance
functions_to_implement: WcagComplianceTest for automated WCAG 2.1 AA validation
ScreenReaderIntegrationTest ensuring proper TalkBack functionality
AccessibilityEnhancements for improved content descriptions
Color contrast validation for all component color combinations
tests_to_write: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance test covering all interactive elements
Screen reader announcement verification test
Keyboard navigation flow test
Touch target size validation test (48dp minimum)
Color contrast ratio verification test

acceptance_criteria: All interactive elements meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards
Screen reader announcements provide clear context for all interactions
Keyboard navigation works for all interactive elements
Color contrast ratios meet 4.5:1 requirement for normal text
Touch targets meet 48dp minimum size requirement
Content descriptions accurately describe dynamic and static content
validation_steps: Automated accessibility scanning using Android Accessibility Scanner
Manual testing with TalkBack enabled across all screens
Keyboard navigation testing on physical devices
Color contrast validation using accessibility tools
potential_risks: Complex UI components may have inadequate accessibility support
Dynamic content might not provide proper screen reader context
Keyboard navigation could be incomplete for complex interactions

tasks.title: Legacy Component Retirement Strategy and Implementation
tasks.description: Comprehensive strategy and implementation for retiring legacy components (Card, Button, ViewModel patterns) to eliminate dual-system architecture, reduce memory overhead, and prevent future technical debt accumulation

read: All legacy component files for assessment and removal planning

implementation_details.approach: Systematic legacy component identification, deprecation warning system, migration framework with automated detection, enforcement mechanisms preventing new legacy usage
functions_to_implement: LegacyComponentInventory for cataloging all legacy components still in use
LegacyMigrationFramework for systematic replacement process
DeprecationWarningSystem with compile-time and runtime warnings
Automated legacy component detection in CI/CD pipeline
Developer guidelines and code review enforcement
tests_to_write: LegacyComponentDetectionTest scanning entire codebase for legacy patterns
Migration completeness verification test
Performance improvement validation after legacy removal
Memory usage reduction measurement test

acceptance_criteria: Complete inventory of all legacy components and usage patterns
Zero legacy Card/Button components in production code
All ViewModels follow BaseViewModel<S,E> sealed class pattern
Deprecation warnings prevent new legacy component usage
Measurable performance improvement from dual-system elimination
Developer guidelines enforce unified component usage
validation_steps: Automated codebase scan detecting zero legacy component usage
Performance benchmarking showing memory and rendering improvements
Developer workflow testing with deprecation warning validation
CI/CD pipeline enforcement verification
potential_risks: Breaking changes during legacy component removal
Developer productivity impact during transition period
Regression risks from large-scale component replacements

tasks.title: Production Readiness and Rollback Strategy Implementation
tasks.description: Comprehensive production deployment strategy including feature flagging for gradual rollout, rollback capabilities, monitoring and alerting systems, and user feedback collection to ensure safe UI redesign deployment

implementation_details.approach: Feature flag system for gradual UI rollout, comprehensive monitoring for UI performance and user behavior, automatic rollback triggers, user feedback collection and analysis
functions_to_implement: FeatureFlagManager for controlling UI redesign rollout percentage
UiRedesignMonitor tracking performance metrics and user behavior changes
RollbackStrategy with automatic triggers for critical issues
UserFeedbackCollector with in-app feedback mechanisms
A/B testing framework comparing old vs new UI performance
tests_to_write: Feature flag rollout percentage testing
Monitoring system accuracy validation
Rollback trigger mechanism testing
User feedback collection integration testing

acceptance_criteria: Feature flag system controls UI redesign visibility (0-100% rollout)
Comprehensive monitoring tracks UI performance and user satisfaction metrics
Automatic rollback triggers activate on critical performance degradation
User feedback collection provides actionable insights on redesign impact
A/B testing framework measures redesign effectiveness vs baseline
validation_steps: Feature flag rollout testing across different user segments
Monitoring system validation with synthetic performance scenarios
Rollback mechanism testing with simulated critical issues
User feedback collection and analysis workflow validation
potential_risks: Feature flag system failure causing inconsistent UI states
Monitoring overhead impacting app performance
False positive rollback triggers disrupting user experience

tasks.title: Developer Training and Documentation System
tasks.description: Comprehensive developer training program and documentation system covering new component patterns, design system usage, migration guidelines, and code review standards to ensure team adoption and prevent regression

implementation_details.approach: Interactive training materials, comprehensive documentation with examples, code review guidelines, troubleshooting guides, onboarding checklist for new team members
functions_to_implement: ComponentMigrationGuide with step-by-step legacy component replacement
DesignSystemUsage documentation with do's and don'ts
CodeReviewGuidelines for enforcing unified component usage
ComponentUsageExamples with live code samples
Interactive training modules for component patterns
tests_to_write: Documentation accuracy validation through code compilation
Example code functional testing
Training effectiveness measurement through developer surveys

acceptance_criteria: Complete migration guide for all legacy component patterns
Design system documentation with clear usage examples
Code review guidelines prevent legacy component introduction
Troubleshooting guide covers common migration issues
New team members can successfully adopt component patterns
validation_steps: Developer training session completion and feedback collection
Documentation usage tracking and effectiveness measurement
Code review guideline enforcement validation
New team member onboarding success rate measurement
potential_risks: Documentation becoming outdated as system evolves
Developer resistance to new patterns
Training time impact on development velocity
